descriptions.it:
Software Engineer Expert - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Software Engineer Expert - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
- Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a 
core requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
- Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
- Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
- Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.

Your profile 

- Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
- Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
- Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI 
development (WPF / XAML).
- Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
- Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
- Fluent in English and Italian.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

descriptions.it:
Software PLC Engineer - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Software PLC Engineer - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Participate in the analysis of project needs and contribute to the definition of software requirements, including 
inputs from Market, Production, and R&D.
- Collaborate with HMI, process control, mechanical, and electrical teams to define specifications for complex PLC and 
real-time software components.
- Develop, test, and optimize PLC and real-time software applications to meet functional and performance requirements.
- Maintain and update technical documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle.
- Support fast prototyping activities and contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component 
Owners.

Your profile 

- Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering.
- At least 1 year of experience in PLC and/or real-time software development (e.g., C, C++, Structured Text).
- Experience with simulation and modeling tools (e.g., Matlab/Simulink).
- Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics.
- Experience in the machine tools industry and ISO programming is a plus.
- Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

descriptions.it:
Metrology Technician — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Metrology Technician
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile 

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose "We are a sustainability and innovation leader providing superior customer value" is our 
vision and this is what guides us. Our purpose "becoming better every day - since 1802" is what inspires us in our 
daily work. Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

                                    SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer

Georg Fischer Machining Solutions AG • Vollzeit • Meyrin (GE) or Losone (TI) • vor 2W

United Machining is seeking an experienced SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer to design, develop, maintain custom SAP 
solutions and user-centric applications using SAP Fiori/UI5 framework.

The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between business requirements and technical solutions, creating intuitive 
interfaces that enhance user experience across our SAP landscape.

Ready to join?

Your tasks 

- Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements and printout forms
- Design and develop SAP Fiori applications using SAPUI5 framework, including transactional, analytical, and fact 
sheet apps
- Build custom Fiori apps and extend standard Fiori applications to meet specific business requirements
- Develop OData services using SAP Gateway and integrate with backend SAP systems (ECC, S/4HANA)
- Configure and customize SAP Fiori Launchpad, including tile creation, role assignment, and theme customization
- Create technical specifications based on functional requirements
- Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization
- Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations
- Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders

Your profile 

- 5+ years of hands-on SAP ABAP development (OO, BAPIs, BADIs, User Exits, WebDynpro) and solid experience in both ECC 
and S/4HANA environments.
- Proven expertise in SAP Fiori/UI5 development, including OData service creation and SAP Gateway integration.
- Comfort with core SAP development tools and technologies such as SE80/SE11, ALV, Forms (SmartForms/Adobe), CDS 
Views, REST APIs, and Web IDE/BAS.
- Ability to understand business processes (FI/CO, MM/SD, PP/QM) and translate requirements into reliable, 
maintainable technical solutions.
- Familiarity with integration concepts (IDoc, ALE, EDI) and ideally with SAP PI/PO, CPI, or CAP for cloud-native 
extensions.
- Self-driven, detail-oriented developer who learns quickly, collaborates well, and maintains high-quality code and 
documentation.

Benefits 

Clear vision and purpose

Sustainability and innovation focus

We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together.

Excellent learning tools

We provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized 
courses.

Great career opportunities

United machining as a global acting company provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep@GF) to boost your career.

Your contact 

Fanny Brault

HR Manager

E-Mail

Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8

1217 Meyrin

Switzerland

1.3087896.3971841

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

                                    Your tasks

- Create and maintain electrical drawings using CAD tools in compliance with internal standards.
- Assist in assembly, testing, validation, and basic troubleshooting of prototypes and laboratory machines.
- Collaborate with R&D and Production teams on quality improvement and industrialization activities.

- 1–2 years of experience in a similar role (internships included).
- Basic knowledge of electrical systems and industrial wiring principles.
- Familiarity with electrical CAD tools and schematic design.
- Hands-on attitude, proactive mindset, and strong team orientation.
- Fluent in Italian; English level B2 or higher.

                                    Your tasks 

- Strategic HR business partnering: act as trusted advisor to HR and business leaders, translating business needs into 
efficient HR system solutions.
- SAP HR functional ownership: lead SAP HR modules (payroll, time management, organizational management, personnel 
administration), ensuring system stability, compliance, and continuous improvement.
- Integration & satellite systems management: oversee HR satellite systems and interfaces, coordinating with IT and 
vendors to ensure seamless data flows.
- Project & change management: lead and contribute to HR IT projects, managing cross-functional teams, communication, 
training, and documentation.
- Process optimization & data quality: drive continuous improvement of HR processes, efficiency, data accuracy, and 
user experience.
- Governance & vendor management: manage external providers, monitor SLAs, support budgeting, and contribute to HR 
systems roadmap and technology decisions.

Your profile 

- Strong SAP HR expertise: solid experience with SAP HR, especially organizational management, master data, Swiss 
payroll and time management.
- HR systems & integration experience: proven experience managing system integrations and hybrid IT landscapes.
- Functional & technical capability: ability to write functional specifications, validate technical designs, and 
ensure data quality and compliance.
- Strong HR process knowledge: deep understanding of HR business processes and operational realities.
- Consulting & analytical mindset: ability to translate business needs into solutions and proactively drive 
improvements.
- Project & change experience: experience contributing to HR IT, transformation and change management projects.
- Stakeholder & vendor management: excellent communication skills and ability to manage internal and external partners.
- International & complex environments: proven experience working in cross-functional, multinational contexts.
- Delivery-oriented team player: resilient, motivated by challenges, and passionate about building robust HCM systems.
- Education & experience: bachelor’s degree in a relevant field with 5+ years of experience in HR IT, HR systems, or 
SAP HR consulting.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's 
work towards a sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools We provide development opportunities for everyone. 
We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Great career opportunities As a global 
acting company we provide many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management 
process to boost your career. 

Your contact

Fanny BraultHR Manager Web E-Mail Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8
1217 Meyrin
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

United Machining is the world’s leading provider of machine tools, diverse technical solutions and services to 
manufacturers of precision molds and tooling and of tight-tolerance, precision-machined components. The key segments we 
serve include the aerospace, automotive, medical, energy, information and communications technology (ICT) and 
electronics industries

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

                                    Your tasks 

- Strategic HR business partnering: act as trusted advisor to HR and business leaders, translating business needs into 
efficient HR system solutions.
- SAP HR functional ownership: lead SAP HR modules (payroll, time management, organizational management, personnel 
administration), ensuring system stability, compliance, and continuous improvement.
- Integration & satellite systems management: oversee HR satellite systems and interfaces, coordinating with IT and 
vendors to ensure seamless data flows.
- Project & change management: lead and contribute to HR IT projects, managing cross-functional teams, communication, 
training, and documentation.
- Process optimization & data quality: drive continuous improvement of HR processes, efficiency, data accuracy, and 
user experience.
- Governance & vendor management: manage external providers, monitor SLAs, support budgeting, and contribute to HR 
systems roadmap and technology decisions.

Your profile 

- Strong SAP HR expertise: solid experience with SAP HR, especially organizational management, master data, Swiss 
payroll and time management.
- HR systems & integration experience: proven experience managing system integrations and hybrid IT landscapes.
- Functional & technical capability: ability to write functional specifications, validate technical designs, and 
ensure data quality and compliance.
- Strong HR process knowledge: deep understanding of HR business processes and operational realities.
- Consulting & analytical mindset: ability to translate business needs into solutions and proactively drive 
improvements.
- Project & change experience: experience contributing to HR IT, transformation and change management projects.
- Stakeholder & vendor management: excellent communication skills and ability to manage internal and external partners.
- International & complex environments: proven experience working in cross-functional, multinational contexts.
- Delivery-oriented team player: resilient, motivated by challenges, and passionate about building robust HCM systems.
- Education & experience: bachelor’s degree in a relevant field with 5+ years of experience in HR IT, HR systems, or 
SAP HR consulting.

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's 
work towards a sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools We provide development opportunities for everyone.

descriptions.it:
## Impiegato in logistica di magazzino

**AGIE Charmilles SA** — Losone (TI)

AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions) cerca Impiegato in logistica di magazzino a Losone. Azienda leader mondiale nelle macchine utensili ad alta precisione (elettroerosione, fresatura, laser, AM). Sede a Losone (TI), parte del gruppo Georg Fischer.

AGIE Charmilles SA, parte di GF Machining Solutions e del gruppo Georg Fischer, sviluppa macchine utensili di alta precisione per elettroerosione, fresatura, laser e additive manufacturing. La sede di Losone rappresenta un polo tecnologico di riferimento per il Ticino industriale.

Offriamo un ambiente internazionale, progetti ad alto contenuto tecnico, collaborazione con team di engineering specializzati e concrete opportunità di crescita professionale.
descriptions.en: ## Warehouse logistics employee **AGIE Charmilles SA** — Losone (TI) AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions) is looking for a warehouse logistics employee in Losone. World leading company in high precision machine tools (EDM, milling, laser, AM). Headquarters in Losone (TI), part of the Georg Fischer group. AGIE Charmilles SA, part of GF Machining Solutions and the Georg Fischer Group, develops high-precision machine tools for EDM, milling, laser and additive manufacturing. The Losone headquarters represents a reference technological hub for industrial Ticino. We offer an international environment, projects with high technical content, collaboration with specialized engineering teams and concrete opportunities for professional growth.
descriptions.de: ## Lagerlogistikmitarbeiter **AGIE Charmilles SA** — Losone (TI) AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions) sucht einen Lagerlogistikmitarbeiter in Losone. Weltweit führendes Unternehmen für hochpräzise Werkzeugmaschinen (EDM, Fräsen, Laser, AM). Hauptsitz in Losone (TI), Teil der Georg Fischer-Gruppe. AGIE Charmilles SA, Teil von GF Machining Solutions und der Georg Fischer Gruppe, entwickelt hochpräzise Werkzeugmaschinen für EDM, Fräsen, Laser und additive Fertigung. Der Hauptsitz in Losone ist ein Referenz-Technologiezentrum für die Tessiner Industrie. Wir bieten ein internationales Umfeld, Projekte mit hohem technischen Inhalt, die Zusammenarbeit mit spezialisierten Ingenieurteams und konkrete Möglichkeiten zur beruflichen Weiterentwicklung.
descriptions.fr: ## Employé en logistique d'entrepôt **AGIE Charmilles SA** — Losone (TI) AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions) recherche un employé en logistique d'entrepôt à Losone. Entreprise leader mondial dans les machines-outils de haute précision (EDM, fraisage, laser, FA). Siège social à Losone (TI), partie du groupe Georg Fischer. AGIE Charmilles SA, qui fait partie de GF Machining Solutions et du groupe Georg Fischer, développe des machines-outils de haute précision pour l'électroérosion, le fraisage, le laser et la fabrication additive. Le siège de Losone représente un pôle technologique de référence pour l'industrie tessinoise. Nous offrons un environnement international, des projets à haut contenu technique, une collaboration avec des équipes d'ingénierie spécialisées et des opportunités concrètes d'évolution professionnelle.

## Electronic Engineer - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines.
- Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, 
contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams.
- Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components.
- Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities.
- Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle.

Your profile 

- Master's degree in Electronic Engineering.
- Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and 
electronic simulation tools.
- Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, VB.net).
- Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus.
- Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement.
- Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities G 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Le tue responsabilità 

- Gestire la merce in entrata e in uscita dal magazzino, registrando correttamente ogni movimento nel sistema 
gestionale.
- Verificare bolle, codici e documenti di trasporto, garantendo conformità alle procedure e agli standard qualitativi.
- Organizzare e presidiare l’area di magazzino, assicurando ordine, corretta conservazione della merce e controllo 
delle operazioni di stoccaggio.
- Effettuare il rifornimento delle linee produttive e preparare la documentazione necessaria alla movimentazione dei 
materiali.
- Eseguire operazioni di carico e scarico merci con carrelli elevatori e partecipare alle attività di inventario 
periodico.

Il tuo profilo 

- Formazione come Impiegato/a in Logistica (AFC) o titolo equivalente, con almeno 2 anni di esperienza in ambito 
magazzino.
- Buona conoscenza dei processi logistici, del pacchetto Microsoft Office e basi SAP.
- Patentino per carrelli elevatori (frontale, retrattile, timone, trasversale) e patente B.
- Precisione, affidabilità, autonomia.
- Attitudine al lavoro in team e disponibilità al lavoro su turni.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities

6616 Losone

descriptions.en: Warehouse logistics employee — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Warehouse logistics employee AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporary: No Workload: 100% Switzerland, Losone Language: it Original advert / Apply Homepage Your responsibilities - Manage goods entering and leaving the warehouse, correctly recording each movement in the management system. - Check bills, codes and transport documents, ensuring compliance with procedures and quality standards. - Organize and supervise the warehouse area, ensuring order, correct conservation of goods and control of storage operations. - Replenish the production lines and prepare the documentation necessary for the movement of materials. - Carry out loading and unloading operations with forklifts and participate in periodic inventory activities. Your profile - Training as a Logistics Employee (AFC) or equivalent qualification, with at least 2 years of experience in the warehouse sector. - Good knowledge of logistics processes, the Microsoft Office package and SAP basics. - License for forklifts (frontal, retractable, drawbar, transversal) and B license. - Precision, reliability, autonomy. - Ability to work in a team and availability to work in shifts. Benefits Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities Your contact Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Switzerland View larger map Your work route Apply now Who we are Back
descriptions.de: Mitarbeiter für Lagerlogistik – AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Lagerlogistikmitarbeiter AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Schweiz, Losone Keine Angestellten (Schweiz) Keine Angestellten (global) Temporär: Nein Arbeitsbelastung: 100 % Schweiz, Losone Sprache: it Originalanzeige / Bewerben Homepage Ihre Aufgaben - Wareneingang und -ausgang im Lager verwalten und jede Bewegung korrekt im Verwaltungssystem erfassen. - Überprüfen Sie Rechnungen, Codes und Transportdokumente und stellen Sie sicher, dass die Verfahren und Qualitätsstandards eingehalten werden. - Organisation und Überwachung des Lagerbereichs, Gewährleistung der Ordnung, korrekte Lagerung der Waren und Kontrolle der Lagervorgänge. - Füllen Sie die Produktionslinien wieder auf und bereiten Sie die für den Materialtransport erforderliche Dokumentation vor. - Be- und Entladevorgänge mit Gabelstaplern durchführen und an regelmäßigen Inventuraktivitäten teilnehmen. Ihr Profil - Ausbildung zum Logistikmitarbeiter (AFC) oder gleichwertiger Abschluss, mit mindestens 2 Jahren Erfahrung im Lagerbereich. - Gute Kenntnisse der Logistikprozesse, des Microsoft Office-Pakets und der SAP-Grundlagen. - Führerschein für Gabelstapler (Front-, Einzieh-, Deichsel-, Querstapler) und B-Führerschein. - Präzision, Zuverlässigkeit, Autonomie. - Teamfähigkeit und Bereitschaft zur Schichtarbeit. Vorteile Klare Vision und Zielsetzung Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsfokus Hervorragende Lerntools Tolle Karrieremöglichkeiten Ihre Kontaktperson Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Größere Karte anzeigen Ihr Arbeitsweg Jetzt bewerben Wer wir sind Zurück
descriptions.fr: Employé logistique d'entrepôt — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Employé de logistique d'entrepôt AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Suisse, Losone Aucun Angestellte (Schweiz) Aucun Angestellte (mondial) Temporaire : Non Charge de travail : 100 % Suisse, Losone Langue : it Annonce originale / Postuler Page d'accueil Vos responsabilités - Gérer les marchandises entrant et sortant de l'entrepôt, en enregistrant correctement chaque mouvement dans le système de gestion. - Vérifier les factures, les codes et les documents de transport, en s'assurant du respect des procédures et des normes de qualité. - Organiser et superviser la zone de l'entrepôt, en assurant l'ordre, la bonne conservation des marchandises et le contrôle des opérations de stockage. - Réapprovisionner les lignes de production et préparer la documentation nécessaire au mouvement des matériaux. - Effectuer les opérations de chargement et de déchargement avec des chariots élévateurs et participer aux activités d'inventaire périodiques. Votre profil - Formation d'Employé Logistique (AFC) ou qualification équivalente, avec une expérience d'au moins 2 ans dans le secteur des entrepôts. - Bonne connaissance des processus logistiques, du package Microsoft Office et des bases SAP. - Permis pour chariots élévateurs (frontaux, escamotables, à timon, transversal) et permis B. - Précision, fiabilité, autonomie. - Capacité à travailler en équipe et disponibilité à travailler en équipes. Avantages Vision et objectif clairs Accent sur la durabilité et l'innovation Excellents outils d'apprentissage Excellentes opportunités de carrière Votre contact Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Suisse Agrandir la carte Votre itinéraire de travail Postulez maintenant Qui nous sommes Retour

descriptions.it: HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + other) — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + other) AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Meyrin, Biel or Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% Switzerland, Meyrin, Biel or Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Your tasks - Strategic HR business partnering: act as trusted advisor to HR and business leaders, translating business needs into efficient HR system solutions. - SAP HR functional ownership: lead SAP HR modules (payroll, time management, organizational management, personnel administration), ensuring system stability, compliance, and continuous improvement. - Integration & satellite systems management: oversee HR satellite systems and interfaces, coordinating with IT and vendors to ensure seamless data flows. - Project & change management: lead and contribute to HR IT projects, managing cross-functional teams, communication, training, and documentation. - Process optimization & data quality: drive continuous improvement of HR processes, efficiency, data accuracy, and user experience. - Governance & vendor management: manage external providers, monitor SLAs, support budgeting, and contribute to HR systems roadmap and technology decisions. Your profile - Strong SAP HR expertise: solid experience with SAP HR, especially organizational management, master data, Swiss payroll and time management. - HR systems & integration experience: proven experience managing system integrations and hybrid IT landscapes. - Functional & technical capability: ability to write functional specifications, validate technical designs, and ensure data quality and compliance. - Strong HR process knowledge: deep understanding of HR business processes and operational realities. - Consulting & analytical mindset: ability to translate business needs into solutions and proactively drive improvements. - Project & change experience: experience contributing to HR IT, transformation and change management projects. - Stakeholder & vendor management: excellent communication skills and ability to manage internal and external partners. - International & complex environments: proven experience working in cross-functional, multinational contexts. - Delivery-oriented team player: resilient, motivated by challenges, and passionate about building robust HCM systems. - Education & experience: bachelor’s degree in a relevant field with 5+ years of experience in HR IT, HR systems, or SAP HR consulting. Benefits Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools We provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Great career opportunities As a global acting company we provide many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process to boost your career. Your contact Fanny BraultHR Manager Web E-Mail Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8 1217 Meyrin Switzerland View larger map Your work route Apply now Who we are United Machining is the world’s leading provider of machine tools, diverse technical solutions and services to manufacturers of precision molds and tooling and of tight-tolerance, precision-machined components. The key segments we serve include the aerospace, automotive, medical, energy, information and communications technology (ICT) and electronics industries Indietro

descriptions.de: HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + andere) — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + andere) AGIE Charmilles SA ## AGIE Charmilles SA, Schweiz, Meyrin, Biel oder Losone ## Keine Angestellten (Schweiz) Keine Angestellten (global) ## ## Temporär: Nein ## Arbeitsbelastung: 100% ## Schweiz, Meyrin, Biel oder Losone Sprache: de ## Originalanzeige / Bewerben ## Homepage ## ## Ihre Aufgaben - Strategische HR-Business-Partner-Funktion: als vertrauenswürdiger Berater für HR- und Geschäftsleiter fungieren, Geschäftsanforderungen in effiziente HR-Systemlösungen übersetzen. - SAP HR-Funktionaleigentümerschaft: SAP-HR-Module (Lohnabrechnung, Zeitmanagement, Organisationsmanagement, Personaladministration) leiten, Systemstabilität, Compliance und kontinuierliche Verbesserung sicherstellen. - Integration & Satellitensystemsverwaltung: HR-Satellitensystems und Schnittstellen überwachen, mit IT und Anbietern koordinieren, um nahtlose Datenflüsse sicherzustellen. - Projekt- & Änderungsmanagement: HR-IT-Projekte leiten und beitragen, cross-funktionale Teams, Kommunikation, Schulung und Dokumentation verwalten. - Prozessoptimierung & Datenqualität: kontinuierliche Verbesserung von HR-Prozessen, Effizienz, Datenakkuratesse und Benutzererfahrung vorantreiben. - Governance & Lieferantenmanagement: externe Anbieter verwalten, SLAs überwachen, Budgetierung unterstützen und zu HR-System-Roadmap und Technologieentscheidungen beitragen. ## Ihr Profil - Starke SAP-HR-Expertise: solide Erfahrung mit SAP HR, insbesondere Organisationsmanagement, Stammdaten, Schweizer Lohnabrechnung und Zeitmanagement. - HR-Systeme- & Integrationserfahrung: nachgewiesene Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Systemintegrationen und hybriden IT-Landschaften. - Funktionale & technische Fähigkeit: Fähigkeit, funktionale Spezifikationen zu schreiben, technische Designs zu validieren und Datenqualität und Compliance sicherzustellen. - Starkes HR-Prozesswissen: tiefes Verständnis von HR-Geschäftsprozessen und operativen Realitäten. - Beratungs- & Analytik-Mindset: Fähigkeit, Geschäftsanforderungen in Lösungen zu übersetzen und proaktiv Verbesserungen voranzutreiben. - Projekt- & Änderungsmanagement: Erfahrung in der Beitragung zu HR-IT-, Transformations- und Änderungsmanagementprojekten. - Stakeholder- & Lieferantenmanagement: exzellente Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, interne und externe Partner zu verwalten. - Internationale & komplexe Umgebungen: nachgewiesene Erfahrung in cross-funktionalen, multinationalen Kontexten. - Lieferorientierter Teamplayer: resilient, durch Herausforderungen motiviert und leidenschaftlich an der Entwicklung robuster HCM-Systeme. - Ausbildung & Erfahrung: Bachelorabschluss in einem relevanten Feld mit 5+ Jahren Erfahrung in HR-IT, HR-Systemen oder SAP-HR-Beratung. ## Vorteile - Klare Vision und Zweck Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsziele. Arbeiten wir gemeinsam an einer nachhaltigen Zukunft. Exzellente Lernwerkzeuge Wir bieten Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten für jeden. Wir bieten globale Lernwerkzeuge sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse. Großartige Karrierechancen Als global tätiges Unternehmen bieten wir viele Möglichkeiten zur beruflichen Weiterentwicklung. Wir bieten auch einen dedizierten Talentmanagement-Prozess, um Ihre Karriere zu fördern.
descriptions.fr: HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + autres) — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## HR IT Business Partner (SAP HCM + autres) AGIE Charmilles SA ## AGIE Charmilles SA, Suisse, Meyrin, Biel ou Losone ## Aucun employé (Suisse) Aucun employé (global) ## ## Temporaire: Non ## Charge de travail: 100% ## Suisse, Meyrin, Biel ou Losone Langue: fr ## Annonce originale / Postuler ## Page d'accueil ## ## Vos tâches - Partenariat stratégique RH : agir en tant que conseiller de confiance pour les dirigeants RH et commerciaux, traduire les besoins commerciaux en solutions efficaces pour les systèmes RH. - Propriété fonctionnelle SAP RH : diriger les modules SAP RH (paie, gestion du temps, gestion organisationnelle, administration du personnel), assurer la stabilité du système, la conformité et l'amélioration continue. - Gestion des systèmes d'intégration et satellites : superviser les systèmes satellites RH et les interfaces, coordonner avec l'informatique et les fournisseurs pour assurer des flux de données sans interruption. - Gestion de projets et de changements : diriger et contribuer à des projets RH IT, gérer les équipes transversales, la communication, la formation et la documentation. - Optimisation des processus et qualité des données :推動 l'amélioration continue des processus RH, de l'efficacité, de l'exactitude des données et de l'expérience utilisateur. - Gouvernance et gestion des fournisseurs : gérer les fournisseurs externes, surveiller les SLA, soutenir la budgétisation et contribuer aux décisions technologiques et à la feuille de route des systèmes RH. ## Votre profil - Expertise SAP RH avancée : expérience solide avec SAP RH, en particulier la gestion organisationnelle, les données de base, la paie suisse et la gestion du temps. - Expérience avec les systèmes RH et l'intégration : expérience éprouvée dans la gestion des intégrations de systèmes et des paysages informatiques hybrides. - Capacité fonctionnelle et technique : capacité à écrire des spécifications fonctionnelles, à valider des conceptions techniques et à assurer la qualité des données et la conformité. - Connaissance approfondie des processus RH : compréhension profonde des processus commerciaux RH et des réalités opérationnelles. - Mentalité analytique et de conseil : capacité à traduire les besoins commerciaux en solutions et à推動 les améliorations de manière proactive. - Expérience avec les projets et les changements : expérience contribuant à des projets RH IT, à la transformation et à la gestion du changement. - Gestion des parties prenantes et des fournisseurs : excellentes compétences en communication et capacité à gérer les partenaires internes et externes. - Environnements internationaux et complexes : expérience éprouvée dans des contextes transversaux et multinationaux. - Équipe orientée vers la prestation : résilient, motivé par les défis et passionné pour construire des systèmes HCM robustes. - Formation et expérience : diplôme de premier cycle dans un domaine pertinent avec 5+ années d'expérience dans RH IT, les systèmes RH ou le conseil SAP RH.

descriptions.it: Ingegnere Elettrico - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Ingegnere Elettrico - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Svizzera, Losone None Angestellte (Svizzera) None Angestellte (globale) Svizzera, Losone Lingua: it Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage I tuoi compiti - Supporto alla progettazione e all'aggiornamento di schemi elettrici, cavi e documentazione PCB. - Creazione e manutenzione di disegni elettrici utilizzando strumenti CAD in conformità con gli standard interni. - Assistenza all'assemblaggio, testing, convalida e troubleshooting di base di prototipi e macchine di laboratorio. - Collaborazione con i team R&D e Produzione per attività di miglioramento della qualità e industrializzazione. - Contributo alla documentazione tecnica e al miglioramento continuo dei processi elettrici. Il tuo profilo - Laurea magistrale in Elettronica o Ingegneria Elettrica. - 1-2 anni di esperienza in un ruolo simile (stage inclusi). - Conoscenza di base dei sistemi elettrici e dei principi di cablaggio industriale. - Familiarità con strumenti CAD elettrici e progettazione schematica. - Attitudine pratica, mentalità proattiva e forte orientamento al team. - Fluente in italiano; livello inglese B2 o superiore. Your profile - Master’s degree in Electronics or Electrical Engineering. - 1–2 years of experience in a similar role (internships included). - Basic knowledge of electrical systems and industrial wiring principles. - Familiarity with electrical CAD tools and schematic design. - Hands-on attitude, proactive mindset, and strong team orientation. - Fluent in Italian; English level B2 or higher. Ihr Profil - Master-Abschluss in Elektrotechnik oder Elektronik. - 1-2 Jahre Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Position (Praktika eingeschlossen). - Grundkenntnisse von elektrischen Systemen und industriellen Verkabelungsprinzipien. - Vertrautheit mit elektrischen CAD-Tools und Schaltplänen. - Praktische Einstellung, proaktive Denkweise und starke Teamorientierung. - Fließend in Italienisch; Englisch-Niveau B2 oder höher. descriptions.it: Ingegnere Software Esperto - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Ingegnere Software Esperto - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Svizzera, Losone None Angestellte (Svizzera) None Angestellte (globale) Svizzera, Losone Lingua: it Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage I tuoi compiti - Sviluppa e mantieni software HMI allineati con i requisiti delle macchine EDM e gli standard di esperienza utente. - Comfortevole gestione di sfide matematiche e algoritmiche complesse, in particolare nella geometria 3D analitica — un requisito fondamentale per l'elaborazione geometrica nel software EDM. - Interfaccia con i team Real-Time & PLC per definire, convalidare e migliorare nuove funzionalità. - Assicurare la qualità del software attraverso test, documentazione e revisioni di codice strutturate. - Partecipare a workshop tecnici, convalide cross-team e condividere conoscenze tra team di ingegneria. Il tuo profilo - Laurea magistrale in Ingegneria Informatica, Informatica o campo tecnico equivalente. - Esperienza comprovata in ambienti software industriali, almeno 3 anni. - Solida formazione in architettura Object-Oriented, UML e programmazione OO (C# / .NET); esperienza nello sviluppo HMI (WPF / XAML). - Buona comprensione del ciclo di vita completo dello sviluppo software, assicurazione della qualità e metodologie Agile / Scrum. - Stile di lavoro strutturato, autonomo e collaborativo; orientato al cliente e resistente alla pressione. - Fluente in inglese e italiano. descriptions.fr: Ingénieur Logiciel Expert - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Ingénieur Logiciel Expert - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Suisse, Losone None Angestellte (Suisse) None Angestellte (globale) Suisse, Losone Langue: fr Annonce originale / Candidater Accueil Vos tâches - Développer et maintenir des logiciels HMI conformes aux exigences des machines EDM et aux normes d'expérience utilisateur. - Gérer confortablement des défis mathématiques et algorithmiques complexes, en particulier dans la géométrie 3D analytique — une exigence fondamentale pour le traitement géométrique dans les logiciels EDM. - Interface avec les équipes Real-Time & PLC pour définir, valider et améliorer de nouvelles fonctionnalités. - Assurer la qualité des logiciels grâce à des tests, à une documentation et à des examens de code structurés. - Participer à des ateliers techniques, à des validations cross-équipe et à un partage de connaissances entre les équipes d'ingénierie. descriptions.it: Tecnico di Metrologia — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI). ## Tecnico di Metrologia AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Svizzera, Losone None Angestellte (Svizzera) None Angestellte (globale) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% Svizzera, Losone Lingua: it Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage I tuoi compiti - Eseguire misurazioni dimensionali e funzionali principalmente nell'area di ispezione e test finale, assicurando accuratezza, ripetibilità e conformità con gli standard di qualità. - Eseguire misurazioni utilizzando sistemi di metrologia avanzati (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) e ambienti software relativi (Calypso, Quindos). - Definire, ottimizzare e standardizzare programmi di misurazione e metodi di ispezione in linea con la metodologia AUKOM e gli standard ISO GPS. - Analizzare i risultati delle misurazioni, supportare l'analisi delle cause radice e collaborare con Qualità, Produzione e R&D per assicurare processi di ispezione robusti. - Gestire e migliorare continuamente i processi di misurazione relativi all'ispezione, la documentazione e le attività di calibrazione, contribuendo all'evoluzione dell'impostazione della metrologia. Il tuo profilo - Diploma tecnico in Meccanica o equivalente. - Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un laboratorio di metrologia o ambiente di misurazione della qualità. La certificazione AUKOM GD&T è un plus. - Conoscenza approfondita dei processi di misurazione dimensionale, sistemi di calibrazione e standard di misurazione. - Analitico, organizzato e autonomo, con forti capacità di collaborazione e coordinamento. - Fluente in italiano; inglese B1. descriptions.it: SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Meyrin Geneva None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% Meyrin Geneva Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer Georg Fischer Machining Solutions AG • Vollzeit • Meyrin (GE) or Losone (TI) • vor 2W United Machining is seeking an experienced SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer to design, develop, maintain custom SAP solutions and user-centric applications using SAP Fiori/UI5 framework. The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between business requirements and technical solutions, creating intuitive interfaces that enhance user experience across our SAP landscape. Ready to join? Your tasks - Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements and printout forms - Design and develop SAP Fiori applications using SAPUI5 framework, including transactional, analytical, and fact sheet apps - Build custom Fiori apps and extend standard Fiori applications to meet specific business requirements - Develop OData services using SAP Gateway and integrate with backend SAP systems (ECC, S/4HANA) - Configure and customize SAP Fiori Launchpad, including tile creation, role assignment, and theme customization - Create technical specifications based on functional requirements - Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization - Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations - Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders Your profile - 5+ years of hands-on SAP ABAP development (OO, BAPIs, BADIs, User Exits, WebDynpro) and solid experience in both ECC and S/4HANA environments. - Proven expertise in SAP Fiori/UI5 development, including OData service creation and SAP Gateway integration. - Comfort with core SAP development tools and technologies such as SE80/SE11, ALV, Forms (SmartForms/Adobe), CDS Views, REST APIs, and Web IDE/BAS. - Ability to understand business processes (FI/CO, MM/SD, PP/QM) and translate requirements into reliable, maintainable technical solutions. - Familiarity with integration concepts (IDoc, ALE, EDI) and ideally with SAP PI/PO, CPI, or CAP for cloud-native extensions. - Self-driven, detail-oriented developer who learns quickly, collaborates well, and maintains high-quality code and documentation. Benefits Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools We provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Great career opportunities United machining as a global acting company provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep@GF) to boost your career. Your contact Fanny Brault HR Manager E-Mail Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8 1217 Meyrin Switzerland 1.3087896.3971841 Indietro

Vertrautheit mit Integrationskonzepten (IDoc, ALE, EDI) und idealerweise mit SAP PI/PO, CPI oder CAP für cloud-native Erweiterungen - Selbstständiger, detailorientierter Entwickler, der schnell lernt, gut zusammenarbeitet und qualitativ hochwertigen Code und Dokumentation pflegt Vorteile Klare Vision und Zweck Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsziele. Arbeiten wir gemeinsam an einer nachhaltigen Zukunft. Exzellente Lernwerkzeuge Wir bieten Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten für alle. Wir bieten globale Lernwerkzeuge sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse. Großartige Karrieremöglichkeiten United Machining als global agierendes Unternehmen bietet viele Möglichkeiten für Karrierewachstum. Wir bieten auch einen dedizierten Talentmanagement-Prozess (MyNextBigStep@GF), um Ihre Karriere zu fördern. descriptions.fr: Développeur SAP ABAP / Fiori — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Développeur SAP ABAP / Fiori AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Meyrin Genève Aucun employé (Suisse) Aucun employé (global) Temporaire : Non Charge de travail : 100% Meyrin Genève Langue : en Annonce originale / Postuler Page d'accueil Georg Fischer Machining Solutions AG • Temps plein • Meyrin (GE) ou Losone (TI) • il y a 2 semaines United Machining recherche un développeur SAP ABAP / Fiori expérimenté pour concevoir, développer et maintenir des solutions SAP personnalisées et des applications centrées sur l'utilisateur en utilisant le framework SAP Fiori/UI5. Le candidat idéal comblera le fossé entre les exigences métier et les solutions techniques, en créant des interfaces intuitives qui améliorent l'expérience utilisateur dans notre paysage SAP. Prêt à nous rejoindre ? Vos tâches - Développer, améliorer et maintenir des programmes SAP ABAP, des rapports, des interfaces, des conversions, des améliorations et des formulaires d'impression - Concevoir et développer des applications SAP Fiori en utilisant le framework SAPUI5, y compris des applications transactionnelles, analytiques et des fiches d'information - Créer des applications Fiori personnalisées et étendre les applications Fiori standard pour répondre à des exigences métier spécifiques - Développer des services OData en utilisant SAP Gateway et les intégrer aux systèmes SAP backend (ECC, S/4HANA) - Configurer et personnaliser SAP Fiori Launchpad, y compris la création de tuiles, l'attribution de rôles et la personnalisation de thèmes - Rédiger des spécifications techniques basées sur les exigences fonctionnelles - Effectuer des revues de code, des débogages et des optimisations de performance - Créer et maintenir une documentation technique complète pour tous les développements et personnalisations - Collaborer avec des consultants fonctionnels et des parties prenantes métier Votre profil - Plus de 5 ans d'expérience pratique en développement SAP ABAP (OO, BAPIs, BADIs, User Exits, WebDynpro) et une solide expérience dans les environnements ECC et S/4HANA - Expertise avérée en développement SAP Fiori/UI5, y compris la création de services OData et l'intégration SAP Gateway - Familiarité avec les outils et technologies de développement SAP principaux tels que SE80/SE11, ALV, Forms (SmartForms/Adobe), CDS Views, REST APIs et Web IDE/BAS - Capacité à comprendre les processus métier (FI/CO, MM/SD, PP/QM) et à traduire les exigences en solutions techniques fiables et maintenables - Familiarité avec les concepts d'intégration (IDoc, ALE, EDI) et idéalement avec SAP PI/PO, CPI ou CAP pour des extensions cloud-native - Développeur autonome, orienté détail, qui apprend rapidement, collabore bien et maintient un code et une documentation de haute qualité Avantages Vision claire et objectif Focus sur la durabilité et l'innovation Nous avons des objectifs élevés en matière de durabilité et d'innovation. Travaillons ensemble pour un avenir durable. Excellents outils d'apprentissage Nous offrons des opportunités de développement pour tous. Nous proposons des outils d'apprentissage globaux ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. Excellentes opportunités de carrière United Machining, en tant qu'entreprise mondiale, offre de nombreuses opportunités de croissance professionnelle. Nous proposons également un processus de gestion des talents dédié (MyNextBigStep@GF) pour booster votre carrière. Votre contact Fanny Brault HR Manager E-Mail Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8 1217 Meyrin Suisse 1.3087896.3971841

Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a core

Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.

Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI development 
(WPF / XAML).
Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
Fluent in English and Italian.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

                                    Electronic Engineer - R&D
Electronic Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines.
Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, 
contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams.
Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components.
Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities.
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle.
Your profile
Master's degree in Electronic Engineering.
Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and 
electronic simulation tools.
Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, ).
Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus.
Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement.
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

                                    Metrology Technician

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.

Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

                                    Software PLC Engineer - R&D
Software PLC Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Participate in the analysis of project needs and contribute to the definition of software requirements, including 
inputs from Market, Production, and R&D.
Collaborate with HMI, process control, mechanical, and electrical teams to define specifications for complex PLC and 
real-time software components.
Develop, test, and optimize PLC and real-time software applications to meet functional and performance requirements.
Maintain and update technical documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle.
Support fast prototyping activities and contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component 
Owners.
Your profile
Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering.
At least 1 year of experience in PLC and/or real-time software development (e.g., C, C++, Structured Text).
Experience with simulation and modeling tools (e.g., Matlab/Simulink).
Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics.
Experience in the machine tools industry and ISO programming is a plus.
Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

descriptions.it: Metrology Technician — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Metrology Technician AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Tipo di lavoro: Unlimited Le vostre attività - Esegui misurazioni dimensionali e funzionali principalmente all'interno dell'area di ispezione e test finale, garantendo precisione, ripetibilità e conformità agli standard di qualità. - Esegui misurazioni utilizzando sistemi di metrologia avanzati (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) e relativi ambienti software (Calypso, Quindos). - Definire, ottimizzare e standardizzare programmi di misura e metodi di ispezione in linea con la metodologia AUKOM e gli standard GPS ISO. - No. Analizza i risultati delle misurazioni, supporta l'analisi delle cause root e collabora con Quality, Production e R&D per garantire processi di ispezione robusti. - Gestire e migliorare continuamente i processi di misura, la documentazione e le attività di calibrazione, contribuendo all'evoluzione della configurazione della metrologia. Il tuo profilo - Grado tecnico in background meccanico o equivalente. - No. Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un laboratorio di metrologia o in un ambiente di misura di qualità. La certificazione AUKOM GD&T è un plus. - Forte conoscenza dei processi di misura dimensionale, dei sistemi di calibrazione e degli standard di misura. - Analitico, organizzato e autonomo, con forti capacità di collaborazione e coordinamento. - Fluente in italiano; inglese B1. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è conosciuto come un marchio premium e leader dell'innovazione in filo, die-sinking, e foro-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione sono utilizzate nella produzione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un processo di gestione del talento dedicato (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali, nonché corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme per un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e soluzioni digitalizzate supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. descriptions.en: Metrology Technician — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Metrology Technician AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks - Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards. - Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments (Calypso, Quindos). - Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO GPS standards. - Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to ensure robust inspection processes. - Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup. Your profile - Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background. - At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T certification is a plus. - Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards. - Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills. - Fluent in Italian; English B1. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Analyser les résultats des mesures, appuyer l'analyse des causes profondes et collaborer avec Qualité, Production et R-D pour assurer des processus d'inspection robustes. - Gérer et améliorer continuellement les processus de mesure, la documentation et les activités d'étalonnage liés à l'inspection, contribuant ainsi à l'évolution de la configuration métrologique. Votre profil - Diplôme technique en fond mécanique, ou équivalent. - Oui. Au moins 3 ans d'expérience dans un laboratoire de métrologie ou un environnement de mesure de la qualité. La certification AUKOM GD&T est un plus. - Connaissance approfondie des processus de mesure dimensionnelle, des systèmes d'étalonnage et des normes de mesure. - Analyse, organisation et autonomie, avec une forte collaboration et coordination. - Fluent en italien; anglais B1. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur d'EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), est connu comme une marque haut de gamme et leader de l'innovation dans le fil, l'enroulement et le forage de trous EDM. Ses solutions d'automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant une précision, une fiabilité et des performances suisses. Grandes opportunités de carrière: UNITED MACHINING offre de nombreuses opportunités concernant la croissance de carrière. Nous offrons également un processus de gestion des talents dédié (MyNextBigStep) pour stimuler votre carrière. Excellents outils d'apprentissage : Chez UNITED MACHINING, nous offrons des possibilités de développement à tous. Nous offrons des outils d'apprentissage mondiaux ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. Priorité à la durabilité et à l'innovation : Nous avons des objectifs de durabilité et d'innovation élevés. Travaillons ensemble vers un avenir durable. UNITED MACHINING est l'un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les fabricants de composants et d'outils de précision et l'industrie de la fabrication de moules. Le portefeuille comprend le fraisage, l'EDM, la texturation au laser, le microusinage au laser et les machines de fabrication additive. En outre, la division offre des broches, l'automatisation, l'outillage et des solutions numérisées soutenues par des services et un soutien inégalés de la clientèle. MACHINING UNITED comprend les marques AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC et SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING a son siège social à Biel, en Suisse, et compte actuellement plus de 3'000 employés sur plus de 50 sites dans le monde.                                     Electronic Engineer \- R\&D Electronic Engineer – R\&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks 
Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next\-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines. Acquire and develop process control know\-how on EDM machines, 
including troubleshooting and process analysis, contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with 
application development teams. Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new 
and second\-source components. Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre\-series activities. 
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle. Your profile Master's 
degree in Electronic Engineering. Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics 
design; knowledge of VHDL and electronic simulation tools. Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, 
oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C\+\+, C\#, ). Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes 
are a plus. Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement. 
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical 
Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. 
Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production of high\-end components, offering Swiss 
precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities 
regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold\-making 
industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing 
machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by

, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000

                                    Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks Perform 
dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring accuracy, 
repeatability, and compliance with quality standards. Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, 
Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments (Calypso, Quindos). Define, optimize, and standardize measurement 
programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO GPS standards. Analyze measurement results, 
support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R\&D to ensure robust inspection processes. 
Manage and continuously improve inspection\-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup. Your profile Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent 
background. At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD\&T 
certification is a plus. Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement 
standards. Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills. Fluent in Italian; 
English B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and 
innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold 
making and the production of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career 
opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent 
management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide 
development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
